Business: Kalyani Steels Limited manufactures and sells iron and steel products. The company provides rolled bars for various automotive applications, including crankshaft, camshaft, connecting rods, gears, transmission shafts, axle beams, steering knuckles, and others. It also offers rolled bars for engineering applications comprising alloyed steels for use…

  Current: 3.63 %  (+0.00% vs prior)
  India impact: Higher Fed rate → capital flows to USD, EM selling pressure; cuts → EM relief rally

  Current: 16.13  (+3.60% vs prior)
  India impact: High VIX → risk-off, FII sell EMs including India; low VIX → risk-on, inflows

  Current: 4.47 %
